title: Rich Tandoor Egg Stir-fry
description: A rich and crispy one-pot Jamaican dish featuring free-range eggs beaten with a hint of sweetness to complement the savory flavors.

ingredients.name: 1/4 teaspoon ground allspice
ingredients.notes: for a touch of spice and depth

ingredients.name: Pinch of cayenne pepper
ingredients.notes: optional, for added heat if desired

instructions: Sauté diced onion in olive oil until soft and translucent. Add minced garlic and sauté for another minute.
Crack each egg into a bowl, beat with salt and pepper, then gently fold into the onion mixture.
Distribute the egg mixture evenly onto baking paper or parchment over two layers to catch any excess liquid.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15 minutes. After 10 minutes, use a spatula to flip and press down lightly on top layer of egg mixtures using tongs if needed.
Sprinkle ground allspice, nutmeg, and cayenne pepper (if using) over the top.
Bake for an additional 5 minutes until golden brown and crispy. Let cool slightly before serving.
